title: Social Media & Internet
description: 15 questions about social media and internet

questions.question: What year was Facebook launched?
questions.explanation: Facebook was launched by Mark Zuckerberg on February 4, 2004.

questions.question: Which platform introduced the concept of 'Stories' that disappear after 24 hours?
questions.explanation: Snapchat introduced Stories in 2013; Instagram later copied the feature.

questions.question: What was the original name of Twitter (now X)?
questions.explanation: Twitter was originally called 'twttr', inspired by Flickr.

questions.question: Which social media platform is owned by ByteDance?
questions.explanation: TikTok is owned by the Chinese company ByteDance.

questions.question: What was the most-liked Instagram post for several years?
questions.explanation: The @world_record_egg became the most-liked Instagram post in 2019.

questions.question: What does 'URL' stand for?
questions.explanation: URL stands for Uniform Resource Locator.

questions.question: Which company owns Instagram and WhatsApp?
questions.explanation: Meta (formerly Facebook) owns Instagram, WhatsApp, and Threads.

questions.question: What year was YouTube founded?
questions.explanation: YouTube was founded in February 2005 and bought by Google in 2006.

questions.question: What is the most-watched YouTube video of all time?
questions.explanation: Baby Shark Dance has over 14 billion views.

questions.question: What does 'SEO' stand for?
questions.explanation: SEO stands for Search Engine Optimization.

questions.question: Which was the first social media platform to reach 1 billion users?
questions.explanation: Facebook reached 1 billion monthly active users in October 2012.

questions.question: What is Reddit's content organized into?
questions.explanation: Reddit is organized into subreddits, each focused on a specific topic.

questions.question: Who purchased Twitter in 2022 and renamed it to X?
questions.explanation: Elon Musk acquired Twitter for $44 billion in October 2022.

questions.question: What was the first website ever created about?
questions.explanation: The first website, created by Tim Berners-Lee at CERN, explained the WWW project.

questions.question: Which AI chatbot went viral in late 2022?
questions.explanation: ChatGPT by OpenAI reached 100 million users in 2 months after its Nov 2022 launch.
